reasons: Kaja can lock a priority target, giving Brody time to apply damage and Abyss Marks.
Brody's burst pattern benefits from a guaranteed single-target pickoff window.

proof.summary: Kaja isolates or locks a target, while Brody follows with mark-based burst and execute pressure.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a target within Brody's attack range.
Brody saves burst for the locked target.
failureCases: Kaja catches a tank instead of a priority target.
Brody is zoned before he can hit.
The enemy peels Brody during the follow-up.

reasons: Franco can create a hook or suppression pickoff that gives Brody a clear target.
Brody can punish the caught target with physical burst and Abyss Mark follow-up.

proof.summary: Franco catches one target first, while Brody uses the control window to apply marks and burst the isolated enemy.
worksBestWhen: Franco pulls or suppresses a target into Brody's range.
Brody focuses the caught target instead of switching targets too early.
failureCases: Franco misses the hook or catches the wrong target.
Brody is too far to follow.
The enemy blocks the hook or counter-engages Brody.

reasons: Atlas creates a frontline engage that lets Brody attack from safer spacing.
When Atlas groups enemies, Brody can apply pressure without needing to walk into the first engage.

proof.summary: Atlas starts and controls the fight, while Brody follows from a safer range with burst and mark pressure.
worksBestWhen: Atlas engages in Brody's attack range.
Brody focuses priority targets after the pull.
failureCases: Brody is zoned away from the grouped targets.
The enemy uses Atlas's engage timing to dive Brody.

reasons: Brody needs space to attack and build Abyss Marks; Lolita helps protect that space.
Lolita's defensive frontline can reduce poke or dive pressure while Brody looks for burst windows.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Brody's position, allowing him to stack marks and prepare Torn-Apart Memory more safely.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stands between Brody and enemy poke or dive threats.
Brody avoids stepping past the protection line.
failureCases: The enemy attacks Brody from multiple angles.
Lolita's protection is forced before Brody can trade.
Brody is caught while rotating alone.

reasons: Angela's shield helps Brody survive burst or dive while he keeps attacking.
Angela can turn a lane fight or small skirmish in Brody's favor by adding sustain and pressure to his mark-based trade.

proof.summary: Angela protects Brody during trades or dives, helping him stay alive long enough to stack Abyss Marks and finish with Torn-Apart Memory.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for real danger or a committed fight.
Brody maintains attack spacing after receiving shield.
failureCases: Angela attaches after Brody is already burst.
Brody is chain-controlled and cannot attack.
The enemy disengages until Angela's shield expires.
